zh.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe是Reverend Owen Oglethorpe和Oglethorpe的女兒，於1515年9月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾卡 可爾斯東受洗。她於大約1532年與Henry Ragsdale在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾聶頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe是Reverend Owen Oglethorpe和Oglethorpe的女儿，于1515年9月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾卡 可爾斯東受洗。她于大约1532年与Henry Ragsdale在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾聶頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Oglethorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Oglethorpe Hall in Bramham (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Ocelestorp in 1086 and Okelesthorp in 1242. The place-name derives from the Old Scandinavian personal name Oddkell + Old Scandinavian or Old English þorp ‘secondary settlement, outlying farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe was christened on 20 September 1515, in Car Colston, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of Reverend Owen Oglethorpe and Oglethorpe. She married Henry Ragsdale about 1532, in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe a été baptisée le 20 septembre 1515, à Car Colston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Reverend Owen Oglethorpe et Oglethorpe. Elle a épousé Henry Ragsdale environ 1532, à Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpeは1515年9月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカー コルストンでReverend Owen OglethorpeとOglethorpeの娘として洗礼を受けた。約1532年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアネエトンでHenry Ragsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムで死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.St Dunstan in the West, London, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 던스탠 인 테 웨스트
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe(은)는 1515년 9월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르 카르 콜스턴에서 Reverend Owen Oglethorpe(와)과 Oglethorpe의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 니턴에서 Henry Ragsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe foi batizada em 20 de setembro de 1515, em Car Colston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Reverend Owen Oglethorpe e Oglethorpe. Ela casou-se com Henry Ragsdale aproximadamente 1532, em Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Dunstan in the West, London, England,: ст дунстань ин т вест, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe была крещена 20 сентября 1515 г. в местности кар колстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Reverend Owen Oglethorpe и Oglethorpe. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Ragsdale около 1532 г. в местности нитон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Henry Ragsdale aproximadamente 1532, en Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
